<div align="center">
<h1>exifast</h1>
</div>
<div align="center">

一个 1:1 的 [ExifTool](https://exiftool.org/) 元数据读取器 Rust 移植版。
第 1 阶段范围：视频和音频格式，仅读取。

[<img alt="github" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/github-Findit--AI/exifast-8da0cb?style=for-the-badge&logo=Github" height="22">][Github-url]
[<img alt="Build" src="https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/Findit-AI/exifast/ci.yml?logo=Github-Actions&style=for-the-badge" height="22">][CI-url]

[<img alt="docs.rs" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/docs.rs-exifast-66c2a5?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=555555&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64," height="20">][doc-url]
[<img alt="crates.io" src="https://img.shields.io/crates/v/exifast?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64," height="22">][crates-url]
[<img alt="crates.io" src="https://img.shields.io/crates/d/exifast?color=critical&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&style=for-the-badge" height="22">][crates-url]
<img alt="license" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPLv3-blue.svg?style=for-the-badge" height="22">

[English][en-url] | 简体中文

</div>

## Installation

```toml
[dependencies]
exifast = { git = "https://github.com/Findit-AI/exifast" }
```

## Features

- [x] 更快的创建GitHub开源Rust代码库

## License

`exifast` is licensed under the **GNU General Public License v3.0 or later**
(`GPL-3.0-or-later`); see [LICENSE](LICENSE).

`exifast` is a Rust port (a derivative work) of
[ExifTool](https://exiftool.org/) by Phil Harvey, which is distributed under
the same terms as Perl (Artistic License *or* GNU GPL); upstream bundles
GPLv3. See [THIRD_PARTY.md](THIRD_PARTY.md) and
[ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md](ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md).

[CI-url]: https://github.com/Findit-AI/exifast/actions/workflows/ci.yml
[doc-url]: https://docs.rs/exifast
[crates-url]: https://crates.io/crates/exifast
